TechCrunch listing page showed misleading relative timestamps ('2 hours ago', '21 hours ago'). Article-level og:published_time metadata used as authoritative date source.
Claude Sonnet 5 published June 30 PDT (US) = July 1 Thai time. Treated as within window. Confirmed by Techsauce Thai report dated July 1, 2026.
